summary: Iteration 13 — Backend pytest 29/29 PASS for /api/admin/stats enrichment, full /api/jobs/* CRUD + applications, full /api/transport/* flow (estimate, request, register, accept, complete with 15% commission, cancel, my-rides). One backend bug found and fixed: route ordering in jobs.py (/{job_id}/applications was matching before /my/applications causing 404 on GET /api/jobs/my/applications). Frontend: Admin /admin Dashboard tab renders correctly with admin-dashboard + admin-crowdfunding-stats + admin-gaming-stats + admin-jobs-stats + admin-transport-stats (all 4 new MiniStat sections visible with real values). Critical frontend bug found and fixed: ServicesPage.js had broken orphan JSX (38 lines of dead MarketplaceModule fragment) AFTER the component's closing brace, causing 'Compiled with problems: SyntaxError: Missing semicolon (386:3)' that broke ALL frontend pages. After cleanup the app compiles. HOWEVER another critical UI integration issue remains: Jobs and Transport service cards are NOT rendered as active in /services hub. Only 4 active cards render (marketplace, crypto, crowdfunding, games). 'Jobs' and 'Transport' do not appear at all in the active list — the Bientôt disponibles section shows 5 unrelated coming-soon items (Food Delivery, Publicités, Événements, Offres, E-commerce) but neither Jobs nor Transport. As a result the JobsModule and TransportModule cannot be reached from /services, so frontend e2e flows (jobs-page, transport-page, jobs-cat-*, create-job-btn, mode-rider/driver, fare-estimate, request-ride-btn, driver-register-form, driver-profile, available rides) could NOT be exercised. Backend modules are fully functional and proven via pytest, but the corresponding frontend cards are missing/not wired.

minor.issue: Route ordering bug — these routes were declared AFTER /{job_id}/applications and /{job_id}, so FastAPI matched /{job_id}/applications with job_id='my' first → 404. Fixed by moving the /my/* routes above /{job_id} routes in jobs.py.

ui_bugs.issue: Broken orphan JSX (lines 386-423) AFTER component closing brace produced SyntaxError that prevented the entire frontend from compiling. Fixed by truncating dead code.

service-jobs and service-transport cards are NOT present in the active services grid. Only 4 cards render: service-marketplace, service-crypto, service-crowdfunding, service-games. Jobs and Transport modules are therefore unreachable from /services. The 'Bientôt disponibles' section unrelated.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test — service-jobs card missing from ServicesPage. Backend /api/jobs/* fully working (29/29 pytest pass).
Cannot test — service-transport card missing from ServicesPage. Backend /api/transport/* fully working including driver registration, accept, complete with 15% commission and wallet transfer.

action_items: Fix ServicesPage.js to expose service-jobs and service-transport as active cards (currently only 4 of the required 6). The cards should setView('jobs') / setView('transport') to mount JobsModule / TransportModule respectively (which already exist and work).
Verify after fix that clicking service-jobs renders [data-testid='jobs-page'] and clicking service-transport renders [data-testid='transport-page'] with all sub-selectors listed in the spec.
(Already fixed by tester) ServicesPage.js dead-code SyntaxError + jobs.py route ordering for /my/postings & /my/applications.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend admin/stats correctly aggregates crowdfunding (by_category list), gaming (by_type list), jobs (total/open/applications), transport (rides_total/completed/revenue/drivers). Decimals serialised as strings, and 403 enforced for non-admin. Solid.

Transport haversine fare verified mathematically: 500 + d*200 (standard) / 500 + d*350 (premium). Commission 15% computed on completion; rider wallet debited fare and driver wallet credited net (fare - 15%). Transactions row created with type='ride_payment'. drivers.total_rides incremented.

Jobs anti-abuse correctly rejects: invalid category (400), salary_max < salary_min (400), self-application (400), duplicate application (400). Notifications inserted on apply and on ride_accept/complete.

ROUTE ORDERING BUG (now fixed by tester): jobs.py declared /{job_id} and /{job_id}/applications BEFORE /my/postings and /my/applications. FastAPI matched /api/jobs/my/applications against /{job_id}/applications with job_id='my', returning 404. Always declare static-prefix routes (/my/*, /search, etc.) BEFORE parametric ones.

ServicesPage.js had ~40 lines of orphan JSX after the component's closing brace (looked like a leftover from refactoring out the inline Marketplace fragment). This blocked Webpack compilation entirely. The main agent should sanity-check files end-to-end after large refactors.

ServicesPage.js does NOT expose service-jobs and service-transport cards even though the JobsModule and TransportModule files exist and the backend is fully functional. The integration is incomplete — only 4 of the required 6 service cards are rendered in the active grid.

Wallet integration in transport.complete_ride correctly uses FOR UPDATE on rider wallet but does NOT FOR UPDATE the driver wallet — minor concurrency consideration if a driver completes 2 rides in parallel.
transport.estimate exposes per_km and base in breakdown — good for transparency.
jobs.list returns full row including poster contact fields (first_name/last_name/avatar/username) joined from users — appropriate for display.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.js (removed lines 386-423 orphan JSX that caused SyntaxError)

success_rate.frontend: Admin Dashboard 100% (5/5 testids visible). Services hub 67% (4/6 active cards). Jobs & Transport modules 0% — unreachable due to missing service cards.

seed_data_creation: Created 1 test job (TEST_DevPython_*) and 2 test ride_requests (1 completed end-to-end with payment, 1 pending then cancelled) via pytest. Driver profile updated for testref_1776710356.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid; do NOT re-test backend unless changes. Focus retest on /services after main agent adds service-jobs + service-transport cards to ServicesPage.js. Once cards are clickable, run JobsModule flow (open create modal, post job, click card for detail, apply as different user) and TransportModule flow (rider mode → fare-estimate → request-ride; switch to driver mode with driver creds → accept → complete). Note that admin already has trillions XAF, so any wallet-debiting tests use admin as rider. Driver creds: testref_1776710356@japap.com / Test1234! (already registered with Toyota Corolla CE123AB / standard).
rca of the issue: Main agent left a partial refactor in ServicesPage.js: dead JSX from the previous inline-Marketplace block was not deleted, producing a fatal SyntaxError. Additionally, the new active-services grid only declares 4 cards (marketplace/crypto/crowdfunding/games) — the Jobs and Transport entries were never added (or were placed in the 'Bientôt disponibles' coming-soon section). Reproduction: visit /services as admin → only 4 active cards render; no service-jobs / service-transport testids exist in the DOM. Mitigation: extend the activeServices array in ServicesPage.js to include jobs (icon Briefcase, setView('jobs')) and transport (icon Car, setView('transport')) with data-testid='service-jobs' and 'service-transport'; ensure setView routing mounts JobsModule and TransportModule (these files exist and their backends pass 29/29 pytest).
